Utpala interprets, the last part to mean the navamsa

In the chart of Mahatma Gandhi (i) Ravi and Guru
are in even signs. Lagna and the Moon alone are in odd
signs. Varahamihira's theory fails. In navamsa Lagna
and Guru are in even signs. But in Mrs. Indira Gandhi's
chart Ravi, Guru, Chandra and Lagna are m even signs,
